detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SMAUG.openTrading() (SMAUG.sol#565-591):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (SMAUG.sol#575)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (SMAUG.sol#577)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (SMAUG.sol#577)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (SMAUG.sol#587)
	SMAUG.tradingOpen (SMAUG.sol#273) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SMAUG.openTrading() (SMAUG.sol#565-591)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SMAUG.openTrading()](SMAUG.sol#L565-L591):

	- [uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH())](SMAUG.sol#L575)
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](SMAUG.sol#L577)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](SMAUG.sol#L577)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](SMAUG.sol#L587)
	[SMAUG.tradingOpen](SMAUG.sol#L273) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SMAUG.openTrading()](SMAUG.sol#L565-L591)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SMAUG._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SMAUG.sol#431-495):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SMAUG.sol#479)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SMAUG.sol#509-521)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SMAUG.sol#485)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (SMAUG.sol#559)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SMAUG.sol#493)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SMAUG.sol#647)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SMAUG.sol#627)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SMAUG.sol#629)
	SMAUG._rOwned (SMAUG.sol#233) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SMAUG._takeTeam(uint256) (SMAUG.sol#641-649)
	- SMAUG._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SMAUG.sol#623-637)
	- SMAUG.balanceOf(address) (SMAUG.sol#349-353)
	- SMAUG.constructor() (SMAUG.sol#299-313)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SMAUG.sol#493)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SMAUG.sol#655)
	SMAUG._rTotal (SMAUG.sol#249) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SMAUG._getCurrentSupply() (SMAUG.sol#747-757)
	- SMAUG._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SMAUG.sol#653-659)
	- SMAUG.constructor() (SMAUG.sol#299-313)
	- SMAUG.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SMAUG.sol#405-413)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.15 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- StorageWriteRemovalBeforeConditionalTermination
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.15 (SMAUG.sol#15)
